metadata.title: Phishing Email Investigation & Response
metadata.description: Automated investigation and response workflow for reported phishing emails. Extracts IOCs, checks reputation, and takes containment actions.
Name of the Logic App / Playbook

Extract_Email_Metadata.inputs: Parse the reported email to extract sender, subject, headers, and body content.
Extract_Email_Metadata.description: Parse the reported email to extract sender, subject, headers, and body content.

Extract_IOCs.inputs: Identify and extract all indicators of compromise from the email body and attachments.
Extract_IOCs.description: Identify and extract all indicators of compromise from the email body and attachments.

Check_URL_Reputation.inputs: Query threat intelligence platforms to check reputation of extracted URLs.
Check_URL_Reputation.description: Query threat intelligence platforms to check reputation of extracted URLs.

Check_Sender_Reputation.inputs: Verify the sender address against known malicious sender databases.
Check_Sender_Reputation.description: Verify the sender address against known malicious sender databases.

Is_Email_Malicious.description: Evaluate gathered intelligence to determine if the email is malicious.

Block_Sender_Domain.inputs: Add the sender's domain to the email gateway blocklist.
Block_Sender_Domain.description: Add the sender's domain to the email gateway blocklist.

Search_for_Other_Recipients.inputs: Search mail logs to identify other employees who received the same phishing email.
Search_for_Other_Recipients.description: Search mail logs to identify other employees who received the same phishing email.

Delete_Phishing_Emails.inputs: Purge all instances of the phishing email from user mailboxes.
Delete_Phishing_Emails.description: Purge all instances of the phishing email from user mailboxes.
